payload.key_insight: Broadcom's explosive AI semiconductor revenue growth (106% YoY to $8.4B in Q1, guiding $10.7B in Q2) signals robust demand for custom AI accelerators — Apple is a known Broadcom customer for custom silicon components and networking chips used in its devices and data-center infrastructure, suggesting sustained component supply health and AI-driven chip investment appetite that supports Apple's own silicon roadmap and product cycle momentum.
specific_quotes: Q1 AI revenue of $8.4 billion grew 106% year-over-year, above our forecast, driven by robust demand for custom AI accelerators and AI networking
Our AI revenue growth is accelerating, and we expect AI semiconductor revenue to be $10.7 billion in Q2.
In Q2 we expect revenue growth to increase 47% year-over-year to $22.0 billion, with adjusted EBITDA of 68%
